---
title: "Guides & Documentation"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
description: "Browse technical guides and documentation on security, cloud architecture, and API development from chen.ist's expert team."
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">Resources</div>
    <h1>Technical Guides</h1>
    <p>Comprehensive documentation and how-to guides for security, cloud, and API development.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Browse by category</h2>
    <p class="sub">Deep-dive guides written by practitioners, not marketers.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="security/implementation-guide.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Security</div><h3>Implementation Guide</h3><p>Best practices, frameworks, and step-by-step implementation.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="cloud/migration-handbook.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#81BD4A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Cloud</div><h3>Migration Handbook</h3><p>Cloud migration, optimization, and management resources.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <!-- API guide hidden for now -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Security guide"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Security<br>Implementation Guide</h2>
        <p>A comprehensive guide covering risk assessment, access control, encryption, monitoring, and incident response. Everything you need to build a robust security posture.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="security/implementation-guide.html" class="m-lk">Read the guide</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r rv">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Cloud handbook"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Cloud Migration<br>Handbook</h2>
        <p>Step-by-step strategies for migrating your applications and infrastructure to the cloud, with strategies for minimizing downtime and optimizing costs.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="cloud/migration-handbook.html" class="m-lk">Read the handbook</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Need a custom guide?</h2>
    <p>We create bespoke documentation for organizations with specific requirements.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a call</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
